282.reason: [Error line number is incorrect: 'lineth' was incremented after reading the line, but the '&' character belongs to the current line which hasn't been fully processed yet. The error should be reported on the current line before incrementing lineth.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Error line number is incorrect: 'lineth' was incremented after reading the line, but the '&' character belongs to the current line which hasn't been fully processed yet. The error should be reported on the current line before incrementing lineth.]

297.reason: [Same issue: 'lineth' may not reflect the actual line number where the erroneous single '|' appears because line number is incremented when the line is read, not when the character is processed.]
